_comment: Dynamic README metrics from gitignored or volatile sources (fallow health score, source LOC, inline-suppression counts). Refreshed by `pnpm gen:readme --refresh`, which `pnpm metrics` runs after fallow; committed so the README guard recomputes the badge block without running any tool, and so unrelated commits don't drift it. Truly-static metrics (site rules, permissions, workspace, license) are computed live in scripts/gen-readme-metrics.mts and are NOT stored here.
